title: COUNT vs SUM inconsistency under utf8mb4_general_ci collation
poc: CREATE TABLE t0(c0 VARCHAR(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci);
CREATE VIEW v0(c0, c1) AS SELECT DISTINCT t0.c0, 'a' FROM t0;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM v0 WHERE v0.c1 >= v0.c0;
key_bug_features: COUNT and SUM produce inconsistent results with boolean expressions
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c0 VARCHAR(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci, c1 INT);
CREATE VIEW v1(c0, c1) AS SELECT DISTINCT t1.c0, t1.c1 FROM t1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM v1 WHERE v1.c1 > 1;
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN v1.c0 < 'B' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM v1;
